keys.meta_description: Receipt capture, claims, multi-step approvals, and accounting sync.
keys.hero_description: Capture, approve, and sync to accounting.
keys.features_0_description: Receipts and line items in one flow.
keys.features_2_description: Post approved spend with consistent coding.
keys.sections_0_body: Lost receipts and chat status delay reimbursements.
keys.sections_1_body: Capture, policy check, approval, and coding together.
keys.sections_2_body: Reminders and posting prep after approval.
keys.faq_0_q: Can employees submit expenses on mobile?
keys.faq_0_a: Yes. The mobile app supports receipt photo capture, line item entry, and submission. OCR can extract data from receipts automatically when enabled.
keys.faq_1_a: Expense categories can have per-claim limits, requiring justification above a threshold or a secondary approver. Policy violations are flagged before submission.
keys.faq_2_a: Once approved, the system can auto-post the journal entry and trigger the reimbursement workflow. Most teams reduce cycle time from weeks to days.
keys.faq_3_q: Can we start small and expand?
keys.faq_3_a: Yes. Turn on modules as you grow—HR, finance, analytics, and workflow blocks scale together.
keys.faq_4_a: Use the Pricing page for tiers; Enterprise adds SLA, scale, and governance options.
keys.faq_5_q: How do I get a demo?
keys.faq_5_a: Use Talk to sales or Book demo from the header—our team can align Automation and Scheduler to your process.
keys.faq_6_a: Contact our team for a walkthrough tailored to your workflow.
keys.faq_7_a: Contact our team for a walkthrough tailored to your workflow.
